data.title: Ziegler closes $47.9M financing for Bishop Gadsden Episcopal Retirement Community in successful Series 2025 Bonds closing.
data.description: In Chicago on January 13, 2026, Ziegler revealed the completion of the $47.9 million Series 2025 Bonds for Bishop Gadsden Episcopal Retirement Community. The nonprofit life plan community, situated on James Island, is owned and operated by Bishop Gadsden.

data.title: Kroger appoints Victor Smith as SVP of Retail Divisions; promotes varios unit presidents to key divisions.
data.description: Victor Smith has been appointed as Senior Vice President of Retail Divisions at a leading company based in Cincinnati, with the announcement being made on January 13, 2026. The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) revealed that a number of operating unit Presidents have also been promoted to pivotal divisions within the company. This move signifies strategic personnel changes and highlights the company's commitment to enhancing its retail operations.

data.title: Health In Tech appoints Zain Hasan as Chief Growth Officer to accelerate revenue growth and scale distribution. Nasdaq: HIT.
data.description: In Stuart, Florida on January 13, 2026, Health In Tech, Inc. (Nasdaq: HIT), a company specializing in AI-based InsurTech platforms, revealed the appointment of Zain Hasan as their new Chief Growth Officer. Hasan, who became part of Health In Tech in September 2025, will be assuming this crucial role within the company.

data.title: Grech RV unveils VACANZA-ion™, a new mid-level Mercedes-Benz Sprinter camper van, at a Tampa event. Expands luxury lineup with accessible pricing. (characters: 135)
data.description: A new product called VACANZA-ion has made its debut at the Grech RV Experience in Tampa. This offering showcases Grech craftsmanship, technology, and service at a more affordable price point. The event took place in Riverside, California on January 13, 2026. Grech RV is recognized for manufacturing upscale Class B Mercedes-Benz Sprinter camper vans.

data.title: U.S. Hemp Roundtable supports H.R. 7024, providing 2-year extension for farmers for advancing hemp regulation.
data.description: Legislation has been proposed in Washington, D.C. to grant a two-year extension which aims to offer stability to farmers in the hemp industry. This extension is crucial for providing assurance to farmers amidst the evolving regulatory landscape. The U.S. Hemp Roundtable has expressed appreciation for this move, emphasizing the need for collaboration between lawmakers, regulators, and stakeholders to develop sound regulations for the hemp sector. The legislation introduced on January 13, 2026, signifies a step forward in creating a conducive environment for the industry to thrive. This extension will allow time for necessary discussions and adjustments, ensuring that proposed regulations are balanced and effective for all involved.

data.title: Teledyne to discuss Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Jan 21, 2026, 8:00am PT. Press release to be issued before NYSE opens. Visit www.teledyne.com for details.
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) has scheduled a conference call to review its earnings for Q4 and full year 2025 on Wednesday, January 21, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific Time. Prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on the same day, a press release containing the financial results will be published. For those interested in participating in the call, please visit www.teledyne.com/investors/events-and-presentations about ten minutes before the scheduled time.

data.title: National Tiles in Australia deploys Domo and Snowflake for unified data foundation, benefiting 500+ employees with real-time insights.
data.description: In Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO), a provider of AI and Data Products Platform, disclosed that National Tiles, a prominent retailer of tiles, stone, and timber in Australia, has integrated Domo with Snowflake. This move aims to establish a reliable and expandable data infrastructure for its operations in Australia, benefiting over 500 staff members with immediate insights, efficient processes, and a platform ready for AI analytics. The retail business is swiftly expanding its presence.

data.title: Ingredion will release Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb. 3, 2026, with a webcast and call at 8 a.m. CT.
data.description: Ingredion has scheduled the release of its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results for February 3, 2026. The company will host a webcast and conference call at 8 a.m. CT on the same day to discuss these results.

data.title: Toll Brothers City Living launches Vista Pointe at Port Imperial, a waterfront condo community in West New York, NJ with 73 residences.
data.description: Today, Toll Brothers City Living and Daiwa House have revealed the launch of Vista Pointe at Port Imperial, a new condominium complex in West New York, New Jersey. This exclusive community, situated on the Hudson River opposite midtown Manhattan, features 73 upscale residences and is constructed on one of the final waterfront lots along New Jersey's desirable Gold Coast. Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the nation’s top luxury home builder, and its partner are behind this development venture.

data.title: Bitcoin's price rose over 2.5% to $93,493.57 as it aligns with macro trades via ETFs amid U.S. inflation data.
data.description: Bitcoin's recent increase appeared to be a standard reaction within the cryptocurrency market, primarily influenced by macroeconomic factors rather than crypto-specific events. Following the release of U.S. inflation data, which indicated a 0.3% rise in December and a year-on-year increase of 2.7% in headline inflation, with core inflation easing to 2.6%, Bitcoin surged over 2.5% to approximately $93,493.57. This upward trend was closely tied to the behavior of growth stocks in response to changing expectations regarding the Federal Reserve's potential easing actions later in the year, particularly as January is deemed unlikely for any policy shifts. It is noteworthy that Bitcoin's correlation with rates-sensitive assets through ETFs has strengthened, signaling a shift towards a more macro-driven trading environment.

data.title: Warren Buffett's successor at Berkshire Hathaway, Greg Abel, will be paid $25 million as CEO, 250 times more than Buffett's $100,000 salary.
data.description: At the end of 2025, Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE: BRK). As of 2026, the conglomerate will experience changes, including the salary of the new CEO, Greg Abel. Abel, who succeeded Buffett and has prior experience leading Berkshire's energy and non-insurance divisions, faces the challenge of following in the footsteps of the renowned investor, often dubbed the "Oracle of Omaha." In his new position, Abel will be compensated significantly more than Buffett. A recent filing by Berkshire Hathaway disclosed that Abel's base salary will be $25 million, a substantial increase from Buffett's previous base salary of $100,000. This signifies that Abel's new salary is 250 times higher than Buffett's. Investors are anticipating continued success for Berkshire under Abel's leadership as they look for strong performances from the company's stock.

data.title: Boeing outperformed Airbus in 2025 with more net orders. Boeing shares hit buy point, reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: New data reveals that in 2025, Boeing recorded a higher number of commercial net orders compared to Airbus. The surge in sales has led to a favorable stock performance, with Boeing's shares reaching a buy point. Investor's Business Daily reported on this positive development.

data.title: Alphabet's stock reaches record high following AI deal with Apple as software stocks decline on Wall Street.
data.description: Alphabet achieved a new milestone as its stock reached an all-time high after Wall Street companies increased their price targets on Google stock following a recent artificial intelligence (AI) agreement with Apple. As a result of the deal, Google's momentum has continued in the market. Conversely, software stocks experienced a downturn during the same period.
